name: grace_full_lifecycle_sensor_still_open
description: Warm day. Sensor opens at 13:00 (pause). Sensor closes at 13:10 (grace starts, 5-min grace). At 13:12 sensor opens again while grace is active â€” grace blocks re-pause. Grace expires at 13:15 with sensor still open â†’ re-pause fires.
notes: Tests the grace period full lifecycle: pause â†’ grace â†’ sensor opens during grace (blocked) â†’ re-pause on grace expiry.
Gap 2 (grace expiry re-check) IS already implemented in simulate.py â€” grace_end event checks sensors_open and re-pauses if any are open.

All 4 assertions are logic-track: (1) initial sensor_open â†’ paused; (2) sensor_close â†’ resumed; (3) sensor_open during grace â†’ no_action (grace active); (4) grace_end with sensor open â†’ re-paused.
manual_grace_seconds=300 is a config hint for documentation; actual grace timer logic lives in coordinator.py.

events.note: Hot afternoon. Indoor above comfort_cool=74F. Outdoor too warm for nat vent.
Back door opens. Outdoor 88F > indoor 76F â€” nat vent not eligible. Automation pauses.
Door closes. All sensors closed â€” automation resumes and grace period begins (5 min = 300s).
Grace period marker: grace_active=True for 5 minutes (ends at 13:15).
Door opens again at 13:12, while grace is still active (expires at 13:15). Grace should block re-pause.
Grace period expires at 13:15. Sensor is still open â€” should re-pause automation.

assertions.reason: Sensor opens with outdoor (88F) > indoor (76F) â€” nat vent ineligible. Automation pauses.
All sensors closed â€” automation resumes. Grace period begins.
Sensor opens during active grace period â€” grace blocks re-pause. Simulator _handle_sensor_open() checks grace_active and returns no_action.
Grace expires with sensor still open â†’ re-pause fires. Simulator grace_end handler already checks sensors_open and re-pauses if any sensor is open (Gap 2 already implemented in simulate.py).

verdict.summary: Grace period blocks re-pause during active window; grace expiry with open sensor triggers re-pause
verdict.observed_behavior: paused (13:00) â†’ resumed (13:10) â†’ grace blocks re-pause (13:12) â†’ re-paused on grace expiry (13:15)
verdict.expected_behavior: Grace period prevents rapid pause/resume oscillation; re-pause fires if sensor is still open when grace expires
